title: eria dalzellii
intro: Eria dalzellii, also known as the Dalzell's Eria or Eria dalzellii, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and the Eastern Indian subcontinent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eria dalzellii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or powder for herbal remedies, with its roots and rhizomes being used in traditional medicine.
